message:
🌱 cloudevents: AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents (#1906)

* 🌱 Add cloudevents: AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add cloudevents: AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cloudevents AsyncAPI v3 trait mission: replace raw discussion comment

- Replace raw discussion comment ("Hi, Thanks a lot for your reply!")
  with proper resolution about AsyncAPI v3 native CloudEvents trait support
- Update steps to show how to define CloudEvents message trait in AsyncAPI v3
- Clear truncated code snippets from resolution

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cloudevents-1276-asyncapi-v3-trait-for-cloudevents",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cloudevents: AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents",
+    "description": "AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cloudevents setup",
+        "description": "Verify your cloudevents version:\nCloudEvents is a specification \u2014 check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)\nThis feature requires cloudevents as a dependency."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cloudevents configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant cloudevents configuration:\nI am creating Kafka APIs in AsyncAPI. These APIs should have CloudEvents headers.\nNow, I was wondering if it would make sense to have an official CloudEvents Trait in AsyncAPI to include these CloudEvents headers."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Define CloudEvents trait in AsyncAPI v3",
+        "description": "AsyncAPI v3 supports CloudEvents through message traits. Define a CloudEvents trait in your AsyncAPI document:\n```yaml\nasyncapi: 3.0.0\ninfo:\n  title: CloudEvents Example\n  version: 1.0.0\nchannels:\n  userSignedUp:\n    messages:\n      userSignedUpMessage:\n        traits:\n          - $ref: '#/components/messageTraits/cloudEventsV1'\n        payload:\n          $ref: '#/components/schemas/userSignedUpData'\ncomponents:\n  messageTraits:\n    cloudEventsV1:\n      headers:\n        type: object\n        properties:\n          ce-specversion:\n            type: string\n            const: \"1.0\"\n          ce-type:\n            type: string\n          ce-source:\n            type: string\n            format: uri-reference\n          ce-id:\n            type: string\n        required:\n          - ce-specversion\n          - ce-type\n          - ce-source\n          - ce-id\n```\nThis trait defines the required CloudEvents context attributes as message headers (binary content mode). Apply it to any message that should conform to the CloudEvents specification."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"AsyncAPI v3 Trait for CloudEvents\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The AsyncAPI v3 specification includes native support for CloudEvents through its trait system. AsyncAPI v3 traits can define CloudEvents bindings, allowing AsyncAPI documents to describe event-driven APIs that use CloudEvents format. See the AsyncAPI CloudEvents binding specification for implementation details.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cloudevents",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cloudevents"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cloudevents/spec/issues/1276",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cloudevents/spec"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 17,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "cloudevents"
+    ],
+    "description": "CloudEvents is a specification \u2014 check your SDK version (e.g., pip show cloudevents)"
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:29:51.012Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
